steps.title: State the full date span
steps.content: The student wants to specify how long the Gambia officially used the Gambian pound. The notes give both endpoints: the pound was adopted in 1965 and replaced by the dalasi in 1971.

steps.title: Reject incomplete timing
steps.content: B gives only the start date, C focuses on the dalasi rather than the pound's full period, and D gives no dates. The best sentence states the full span from adoption to replacement. The answer is A.
